sql: SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.status, u.department, u.created_at, o.id as order_id, o.amount, o.status as order_status FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE CASE WHEN #{queryType} = 'active_users' THEN (u.status = #{status} AND u.department_id IN (#{deptIds}) AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%')) WHEN #{queryType} = 'order_summary' THEN (o.status IN (#{orderStatuses}) AND o.amount >= #{minAmount} AND u.id IN (#{userIds})) WHEN #{queryType} = 'date_range' THEN (u.created_at >= #{startDate} AND u.created_at <= #{endDate} AND u.status IN (#{statusList})) ELSE 1=1 END ORDER BY #{sortField} #{sortDir} LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
templateSql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.status, u.department, u.created_at,
       o.id as order_id, o.amount, o.status as order_status
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
<choose>
    <when test="queryType == 'active_users'">
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">
                AND u.status = #{status}
            </if>
            <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
                AND u.department_id IN
                <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                    #{did}
                </foreach>
            </if>
            <if test="namePattern != null">
                AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%')
            </if>
        </where>
    </when>
    <when test="queryType == 'order_summary'">
        <where>
            <if test="orderStatuses != null and orderStatuses.size() > 0">
                AND o.status IN
                <foreach collection="orderStatuses" item="os" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                    #{os}
                </foreach>
            </if>
            <if test="minAmount != null">
                AND o.amount >= #{minAmount}
            </if>
            <if test="userIds != null and userIds.size() > 0">
                AND u.id IN
                <foreach collection="userIds" item="uid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                    #{uid}
                </foreach>
            </if>
        </where>
        <if test="groupBy != null">
            GROUP BY ${groupBy}
        </if>
        <if test="havingCond != null">
            HAVING ${havingCond}
        </if>
    </when>
    <when test="queryType == 'date_range'">
        <where>
            <if test="startDate != null">
                AND u.created_at >= #{startDate}
            </if>
            <if test="endDate != null">
                AND u.created_at <= #{endDate}
            </if>
            <if test="statusList != null and statusList.size() > 0">
                AND u.status IN
                <foreach collection="statusList" item="s" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                    #{s}
                </foreach>
            </if>
        </where>
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        WHERE 1=1
    </otherwise>
</choose>
<if test="sortField != null and sortDir != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField} ${sortDir}
</if>
<if test="limit != null">
    LIMIT #{limit}
</if>
<if test="offset != null">
    OFFSET #{offset}
</if>
